introSection: Katapult was a steel roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It operated during the 1980s and was located at on the Sufside Pier. The Katapult was present when the Jumbo Jet was being dismantled in 1987.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Forum post with a photograph of the roller coaster

fullText:
Katapult was a steel roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It operated during the 1980s and was located at on the Sufside Pier. The Katapult was present when the Jumbo Jet was being dismantled in 1987.


 * Forum post with a photograph of the roller coaster
